# exchanges corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === Centralized Exchange API keys ===

# expect: Coinbase CDP API Key Name
key organizations/abcd1234-ab12-cd34-ef56-abcdef123456/apiKeys/bcde5678-12ab-34cd-56ef-fedcba654321 here.

# expect: Coinbase Pro API Secret
coinbase_api_secret = "FRsgtq09rR7OFtKj9BGhyOGS3u5vtYEdiIBO9kD8NFtRX7w7LeJDSrX6cq1D8zmQmGkWFjksuhBvKOAWJohQAB=="

# expect: Kraken API Key
KRAKEN_API_KEY=ABCDefgh1234567890MNopqrstUVwxyz0123456789ABCDefghIJklmn

# expect: Binance API Key
binance_api_key: vmPUZE6mv9SD5VNHk4HlWFsOr6aKE2zvsw0MuIgwCIPy6utIco14y7Ju91duEh8A

# expect: Gemini API Key (master)
key master-1Aabcdef1234567890ab here.

# expect: Gemini API Key (account)
key account-1Aabcdef1234567890ab here.

# expect: KuCoin Passphrase
kucoin_passphrase = "MyKuCoinPass123"

# expect: OKX Secret Key
OKX_SECRET=22582BD0CFF14C41EDBF1AB98506286D

# expect: Bybit API Secret
bybit_api_secret: BYBITSECRETabcdef0123456789abcdef012

# expect: Bitget API Key
bitget_api_key = "AbCdEf0123456789AbCdEf0123456789"

# expect: Gate.io API Key
gateio_api_key: 1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef

# expect: MEXC API Key
key mx0vglHabcdef0123456789ABCDEF01234 here.

# expect: HTX (Huobi) API Key
htx_api_key = "12345678-abcdef12-12345678-abcdef"

# expect: Crypto.com Exchange API Key
crypto_com_api_key: AbCdEf0123456789GhIjKlMn

# expect: dYdX StarkEx Stark Key
dydx_stark_key = "0x0123abc456def789012345678901234567890123456789012345678901234567"

# expect: Fireblocks API Key
fireblocks_api_key: f5b4c3d2-1e0a-4b9c-8d7e-6f5a4b3c2d1e

# === Robinhood Crypto (Block 3b) ===
# expect: Robinhood Crypto API Key
rh-api-abcdef01-abcd-abcd-abcd-abcdef012345
